title: oxylobium spathulatum
intro: Oxylobium spathulatum, also known as the 'Native Honeysuckle', is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its leaves and flowers, which are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties. Oxylobium spathulatum is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and may also have antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and sometimes used topically to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
